name: Greek Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 6 firm Tomatoes with insides scooped out
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat and sauté onion until translucent.
2. Combine the sautéed onions with all remaining ingredients in a bowl, except for the tomatoes.
3. Stuff the filling into each tomato.
4. Place the stuffed tomatoes on a baking sheet and bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes.
5. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
